title: Offload external polling to a supervised GenServer
prompt: The fixture test_fixtures/external_poll_price.ex has every LiveView polling an external API. Produce two files: (1) lib/my_app/price_ticker.ex (module MyApp.PriceTicker) — a GenServer started in Application's supervision tree, with init/1 scheduling a :tick, handle_info(:tick, state) that calls HTTPClient.fetch_price("BTC"), broadcasts via Phoenix.PubSub.broadcast(MyApp.PubSub, "prices:BTC", {:price, price}), and schedules the next tick; (2) lib/my_app_web/live/price_ticker_live.ex (module MyAppWeb.PriceTickerLive) — subscribes to "prices:BTC" via connected?/1 and handles {:price, price}.
tier_rationale: Multi-file architectural fix. Requires understanding per-user scaling of external polls.
